---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Typelefter
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Motivation

Why is this feature important? How will it help users or developers?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you imagine implementing it.

## Alternatives Considered

Explain any alternative solutions or workarounds you’ve considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots here.
